title: ornithopus repandus var. durus
intro: Ornithopus repandus var. durus, also known as Hardy Burr Clover or Sharp-leaved Burr Clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ornithopus repandus var. durus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves and roots in hot water or using them in teas to harness its medicinal properties.
